rows.label: xs32210100_MSG0010
rows.name: I'm sorry to bother you when you're busy.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32210100_MSG0020
rows.name:
The truth is, a friend I made during
a mission hasn't arrived here yet,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32210100_MSG0030
rows.name:
and I was wondering if you
could go check on her?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32210100_MSG0060
rows.name: I'd like to go myself, but[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32210100_MSG0070
rows.name:
my team is assigned to guide
people to the White Whale 2,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32210100_MSG0120
rows.name:
She lives at the North Meimou
Mountain Peak in Shiraki no Tairiku.[ST:wait ]
